sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 66:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 66:1
items.html: The first restriction was only on phase four, and the second restriction was on phase two, as well. Also, the first restriction was absolute, while in the second restriction, there is the correction of the Parsa, which sometimes brings phase two back to Atzilut. (Inner Observation, Item 27)
